---
title: "Stat Analysis"
author: "CPJ"
date: "2026-04-10"
output: html_document
---
This script will produce the statistic analysis for the manuscript "Peatlands Control Aquatic Carbon Pools and Fluxes in an Arctic Subcatchment".
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
####Load in Libraries####
library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)
library(colorblindcheck)
library(ggpubr)
library(rstatix)
library(readr)
library(patchwork)
library(tools)
library(tidyr)
library(randomForest)
library(caret)
library(ComplexUpset)
library(ggrepel)
library(pairwiseAdonis)
library(flextable)
library(officer)
library(effectsize)

####Import Data Frames####
avg_site_all <- read_csv("avg_site_all.csv")
#ft_site_all <- read_csv("ft_site_all.csv")
avg_site_surf <- read_csv("avg_site_surf.csv")
```

# Group Comparisons

## General Chemistry
```{r Anovas and Kruskal Wallace-Chemistry}
df.ft.mean.filtered <- avg_site_surf %>%
  filter(!Plot %in% c(1, 2)) #filter tundra lakes because theres not that many of them

df.ft.mean.filtered <- df.ft.mean.filtered %>%
  mutate(Aquatic_Type_pair = paste(Aquatic_Type, Landcover, sep = "_"))

# ---------------------------
# 1️⃣ Global test function
# ---------------------------

run_test <- function(data, var, normal = FALSE) {

  df <- data %>%
    select(Aquatic_Type_pair, all_of(var)) %>%
    filter(
      !is.na(Aquatic_Type_pair),
      !is.na(.data[[var]])
    )

  formula <- as.formula(paste(var, "~ Aquatic_Type_pair"))

  if (normal) {

    res <- df %>% anova_test(formula)

    tibble(
      Variable = var,
      Test = "ANOVA",
      Stat_name = "F",
      Statistic = res$F,
      DF1 = res$DFn,
      DF2 = res$DFd,
      p_value = res$p
    )

  } else {

    res <- df %>% kruskal_test(formula)

    tibble(
      Variable = var,
      Test = "Kruskal-Wallis",
      Stat_name = "Chi_sq",
      Statistic = res$statistic,
      DF1 = res$df,
      DF2 = NA,
      p_value = res$p
    )
  }
}


# ---------------------------
# 2️⃣ GLOBAL TABLES
# ---------------------------

global_flux <- bind_rows(
  run_test(df.ft.mean.filtered, "DOC_mgL", FALSE),
  run_test(df.ft.mean.filtered, "TDN_mgL", FALSE),
  run_test(df.ft.mean.filtered, "CN", TRUE),
  run_test(df.ft.mean.filtered, "CO2Flux_gm2d", FALSE),
  run_test(df.ft.mean.filtered, "pCO2_uatm", FALSE)
) %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ signif(.x, 3)))


global_ft <- bind_rows(
  run_test(df.ft.mean.filtered, "Raos_Elemental_Comp", TRUE),
  run_test(df.ft.mean.filtered, "Shannon_Diversity", TRUE),
  run_test(df.ft.mean.filtered, "NOSC_mean", TRUE),
  run_test(df.ft.mean.filtered, "Amino_sugar", TRUE),
  run_test(df.ft.mean.filtered, "Carbohydrate", TRUE),
  run_test(df.ft.mean.filtered, "Cond_HC", TRUE),
  run_test(df.ft.mean.filtered, "Lignin", TRUE),
  run_test(df.ft.mean.filtered, "Lipid", TRUE),
  run_test(df.ft.mean.filtered, "Protein", TRUE),
  run_test(df.ft.mean.filtered, "Tannin", TRUE),
  run_test(df.ft.mean.filtered, "Unsat_HC", TRUE)
) %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ signif(.x, 3)))


global_table <- bind_rows(global_flux, global_ft) %>%
  mutate(
    Variable = recode(Variable,
      "DOC_mgL" = "DOC",
      "TDN_mgL" = "TDN",
      "CN" = "C:N",
      "CO2Flux_gm2d" = "CO2 flux (g m-2 d-1)",
      "pCO2_uatm" = "pCO2 (µatm)",
      "Shannon_Diversity" = "Shannon Diversity",
      "Raos_Elemental_Comp" = "Elemental Composition",
      "NOSC_mean" = "Average NOSC",
      "Amino_sugar" = "Amino Sugar",
      "Cond_HC" = "Condensed HC",
      "Unsat_HC" = "Unsaturated HC"
    )
  )


table_S1 <- global_table %>%
  mutate(
    DF = ifelse(Test == "ANOVA",
                paste0("(", DF1, ", ", DF2, ")"),
                paste0("(", DF1, ")"))
  ) %>%
  rename(
    Statistic = Stat_name,
    Value = Statistic,
    p = p_value
  ) %>%
  select(Variable, Test, Statistic, DF, Value, p)


ft_S1 <- flextable(table_S1) %>%
  bold(i = ~ p < 0.05, j = "p", bold = TRUE) %>%
  colformat_num(j = c("Value", "p"), digits = 3) %>%
  set_header_labels(
    Variable = "Response Variable",
    Test = "Test",
    Statistic = "Statistic",
    Value = "Value",
    DF = "DF",
    p = "p-value"
  ) %>%
  autofit()


# ---------------------------
# 3️⃣ POSTHOC FUNCTION
# ---------------------------

run_posthoc <- function(data, var, normal = FALSE) {

  df <- data %>%
    select(Aquatic_Type_pair, all_of(var)) %>%
    filter(
      !is.na(Aquatic_Type_pair),
      !is.na(.data[[var]])
    )

  formula <- as.formula(paste(var, "~ Aquatic_Type_pair"))

  if (normal) {
    res <- df %>% tukey_hsd(formula) %>%
      mutate(Test_posthoc = "Tukey")
  } else {
    res <- df %>% pairwise_wilcox_test(formula, p.adjust.method = "BH") %>%
      mutate(Test_posthoc = "Pairwise Wilcox")
  }

  res %>%
    select(group1, group2, p.adj, Test_posthoc) %>%
    mutate(
      Variable = var,
      p.adj = signif(p.adj, 3)
    )
}


# ---------------------------
# 4️⃣ VARIABLE MAPS
# ---------------------------

var_map_flux <- c(
  "DOC" = "DOC_mgL",
  "TDN" = "TDN_mgL",
  "C:N" = "CN",
  "CO2 flux (g m-2 d-1)" = "CO2Flux_gm2d",
  "pCO2 (µatm)" = "pCO2_uatm"
)

var_map_ft <- c(
  "Elemental Composition" = "Raos_Elemental_Comp",
  "Shannon Diversity" = "Shannon_Diversity",
  "Average NOSC" = "NOSC_mean",
  "Amino Sugar" = "Amino_sugar",
  "Carbohydrate" = "Carbohydrate",
  "Condensed HC" = "Cond_HC",
  "Lignin" = "Lignin",
  "Lipid" = "Lipid",
  "Protein" = "Protein",
  "Tannin" = "Tannin",
  "Unsaturated HC" = "Unsat_HC"
)


# ---------------------------
# 5️⃣ POSTHOC RUNS
# ---------------------------

sig_vars_flux <- global_table %>%
  filter(p_value < 0.05 & Variable %in% names(var_map_flux)) %>%
  pull(Variable)

posthoc_flux <- map(
  sig_vars_flux,
  ~ run_posthoc(df.ft.mean.filtered, unname(var_map_flux[.x]), normal = .x == "C:N")
) %>%
  bind_rows()


sig_vars_ft <- global_table %>%
  filter(p_value < 0.05 & Variable %in% names(var_map_ft)) %>%
  pull(Variable)

posthoc_ft <- map(
  sig_vars_ft,
  ~ run_posthoc(df.ft.mean.filtered, unname(var_map_ft[.x]), normal = TRUE)
) %>%
  bind_rows()


# ---------------------------
# 6️⃣ TABLE OUTPUT
# ---------------------------

posthoc_table <- bind_rows(posthoc_flux, posthoc_ft)

ft_posthoc <- flextable(posthoc_table) %>%
  bold(i = ~ p.adj < 0.05, j = "p.adj", bold = TRUE) %>%
  autofit()
ft_posthoc

# ---------------------------
# 7️⃣ EXPORT DOCX
# ---------------------------

doc <- read_docx()

doc <- doc %>%
  body_add_par("Table S1: Global Test Results", style = "heading 1") %>%
  body_add_flextable(ft_S1) %>%
  body_add_par("", style = "Normal")

doc <- doc %>%
  body_add_par("Table S2: Post Hoc Test Results", style = "heading 1") %>%
  body_add_flextable(ft_posthoc)

#print(doc, target = "SupplementaryStats_Tables.docx")
```

## NOSC and Mass
### NOSC
####Data
```{r NOSC Data}
df_nosc <- ft_site_all %>%
  mutate(
    Compound_Group = case_when(
      Universal ~ "Universal",
      !Universal & !Partial ~ "Unique",
      TRUE ~ "Shared"
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(Compound_Group %in% c("Universal", "Unique"))

df_nosc$Aquatic_Type <- factor(df_nosc$Aquatic_Type)
df_nosc$Subcategory <- factor(df_nosc$Subcategory,
                              levels = c("Tundra", "Forest", "Peatland"))
df_nosc$Compound_Group <- factor(df_nosc$Compound_Group,
                                 levels = c("Universal", "Unique"))
df_nosc$group <- interaction(df_nosc$Aquatic_Type, df_nosc$Subcategory)
```

```{r NOSC Stats}
analyze_group_nosc <- function(df_subset){
  # Sample sizes
  sample_counts <- df_subset %>%
    group_by(group) %>%
    summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
    mutate(group = as.character(group))
  
  # ANOVA
  aov_res <- aov(NOSC ~ group, data = df_subset)
  
  # Effect size
  eta_val <- eta_squared(aov_res)$Eta2[1]
  
  # TukeyHSD p-values tidy
  tukey_df <- as.data.frame(TukeyHSD(aov_res)$group)
  tukey_df$Comparison <- rownames(tukey_df)
  rownames(tukey_df) <- NULL
  tukey_df <- tukey_df %>%
    dplyr::select(Comparison, `p adj`) %>%
    dplyr::rename(p_adj = `p adj`)
  
  list(
    Sample_Size = sample_counts,
    Test = "ANOVA + Tukey",
    Effect_Size = eta_val,
    Pairwise = tukey_df
  )
}

# -----------------------------
# 4. Run stats for Universal and Unique
# -----------------------------
df_univ_nosc <- df_nosc %>% filter(Compound_Group == "Universal")
df_unique_nosc <- df_nosc %>% filter(Compound_Group == "Unique")

stats_univ_nosc <- analyze_group_nosc(df_univ_nosc)
stats_unique_nosc <- analyze_group_nosc(df_unique_nosc)

# -----------------------------
# 5. Summary tables
# -----------------------------
summary_table <- function(stats_obj){
  df <- stats_obj$Sample_Size
  df$Effect_Size <- as.numeric(stats_obj$Effect_Size)
  df$Test <- as.character(stats_obj$Test)
  df
}

summary_table_univ_nosc <- summary_table(stats_univ_nosc)
summary_table_unique_nosc <- summary_table(stats_unique_nosc)

summary_table_univ_nosc
summary_table_unique_nosc

```

###Mass
#### Data
```{r Mass Data}
df_mass <- df.sl.ft %>%
  mutate(
    Compound_Group = case_when(
      Universal ~ "Universal",
      !Universal & !Partial ~ "Unique",
      TRUE ~ "Shared"
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(Compound_Group %in% c("Universal", "Unique"))

# Factor levels
df_mass$Aquatic_Type <- factor(df_mass$Aquatic_Type)
df_mass$Subcategory <- factor(df_mass$Subcategory,
                              levels = c("Tundra", "Forest", "Peatland"))
df_mass$Compound_Group <- factor(df_mass$Compound_Group,
                                 levels = c("Universal", "Unique"))
```

#### Stats
```{r Mass Stats}
df_mass <- df_mass %>%
  mutate(group = interaction(Aquatic_Type, Subcategory))

# -----------------------------
# 5. Statistics function
# -----------------------------
analyze_group <- function(df_subset){
  # Sample sizes
  sample_counts <- df_subset %>%
    group_by(group) %>%
    summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop")
  
  # ANOVA
  aov_res <- aov(Mass ~ group, data = df_subset)
  tukey <- TukeyHSD(aov_res)$group
  eta <- eta_squared(aov_res)$Eta2
  
  list(
    Sample_Size = sample_counts,
    Test = "ANOVA + Tukey",
    Effect_Size = eta,
    Pairwise = tukey
  )
}

# -----------------------------
# 6. Run stats for Universal and Unique
# -----------------------------
stats_univ <- analyze_group(df_univ)
stats_unique <- analyze_group(df_unique)

# -----------------------------
# 7. Create tidy summary tables
# -----------------------------
summary_table <- function(stats_obj){
  df <- stats_obj$Sample_Size
  df$Effect_Size <- stats_obj$Effect_Size
  df$Test <- stats_obj$Test
  df
}

summary_table_univ <- summary_table(stats_univ)
summary_table_unique <- summary_table(stats_unique)

summary_table_univ
summary_table_unique
```

# Linear Regressions

## General Chemistry

```{r Distance to Outlet}
# ---------------------------
# Distance variable (updated name)
# ---------------------------

avg_site_surf$dist_km <- avg_site_surf$DistancetoOutlet_m / 1000


# ---------------------------
# 1️⃣ Flux models
# ---------------------------

responses <- c(
  "CO2Flux_gm2d",
  "pCO2_uatm",
  "del_DIC",
  "CN",
  "DOC_mgL",
  "TDN_mgL"
)

lm_table <- map_dfr(responses, function(resp) {

  model <- lm(
    as.formula(paste(resp, "~ dist_km")),
    data = avg_site_surf
  )

  coef_tbl <- tidy(model)
  fit_tbl <- glance(model)

  slope_row <- coef_tbl %>%
    filter(term == "dist_km")

  tibble(
    Response = resp,
    Slope = slope_row$estimate,
    SE = slope_row$std.error,
    p_value = slope_row$p.value,
    R_squared = fit_tbl$r.squared,
    N = fit_tbl$nobs
  )
})


lm_table_pub <- lm_table %>%
  mutate(
    Slope = round(Slope, 4),
    SE = round(SE, 4),
    p_value = round(p_value, 4),
    R_squared = round(R_squared, 3)
  )


ft_lm <- flextable(lm_table_pub) %>%
  set_header_labels(
    Response = "Response variable",
    Slope = "Slope\n(distance)",
    SE = "SE",
    p_value = "p-value",
    R_squared = "R²",
    N = "N"
  ) %>%
  autofit() %>%
  align(j = -1, align = "center", part = "all") %>%
  align(j = 1, align = "left", part = "all") %>%
  bold(part = "header") %>%
  fontsize(size = 10, part = "all") %>%
  theme_booktabs()

ft_lm <- ft_lm %>%
  bold(
    i = which(lm_table_pub$p_value < 0.05),
    j = "p_value",
    bold = TRUE,
    part = "body"
  )


# ---------------------------
# 2️⃣ FT models (updated dataset + variable names)
# ---------------------------

responses2 <- c(
  "NOSC_mean",
  "Raos_Elemental_Comp",
  "Shannon_Diversity"
)

lm_table_2 <- map_dfr(responses2, function(resp) {

  model <- lm(
    as.formula(paste(resp, "~ dist_km")),
    data = avg_site_surf
  )

  coef_tbl <- tidy(model)
  fit_tbl  <- glance(model)

  slope_row <- coef_tbl %>%
    filter(term == "dist_km")

  tibble(
    Response = resp,
    Slope = slope_row$estimate,
    SE = slope_row$std.error,
    p_value = slope_row$p.value,
    R_squared = fit_tbl$r.squared,
    N = fit_tbl$nobs
  )
})


# ---------------------------
# 3️⃣ Combine tables
# ---------------------------

lm_table_all <- bind_rows(lm_table_pub, lm_table_2) %>%
  mutate(
    Slope = round(Slope, 4),
    SE = round(SE, 4),
    p_value = round(p_value, 4),
    R_squared = round(R_squared, 3)
  )


# ---------------------------
# 4️⃣ Flextable
# ---------------------------

ftall <- flextable(lm_table_all) %>%
  set_header_labels(
    Response = "Response variable",
    Slope = "Slope",
    SE = "SE",
    p_value = "p-value",
    R_squared = "R²",
    N = "N"
  ) %>%
  autofit() %>%
  align(j = -1, align = "center", part = "all") %>%
  align(j = 1, align = "left", part = "all") %>%
  bold(part = "header") %>%
  fontsize(size = 10, part = "all") %>%
  theme_booktabs()

ftall <- ftall %>%
  bold(
    i = which(lm_table_all$p_value < 0.05),
    j = "p_value",
    bold = TRUE,
    part = "body"
  )

ftall
# ---------------------------
# 5️⃣ Export doc
# ---------------------------

docall <- read_docx() %>%
  body_add_flextable(ftall)

#print(docall, target = "Supplemental_Table_S4.docx")
```

## DOM Composition

```{r Linear Regression}
df_mass <- ft_site_all %>%
  filter(Aquatic_Type != "Porewater") %>%
  left_join(
    compound_flags_pw %>% select(MolecularFormula, unique, universal) %>% distinct(),
    by = "MolecularFormula"
  ) %>%
  mutate(Sharing_Type = case_when(
    unique ~ "Unique",
    universal ~ "Universal",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Sharing_Type))

mass_results <- df_mass %>%
  group_by(Aquatic_Type, Landcover, Class, Sharing_Type) %>%
  group_modify(~{
    df <- .x
    if(nrow(df) < 3) return(tibble(
      slope = NA_real_, SE = NA_real_, p_value = NA_real_,
      R2 = NA_real_, N = nrow(df)
    ))
    model <- lm(Mass ~ DistancetoOutlet_m, data = df)
    slope_row <- tidy(model) %>% filter(term == "DistancetoOutlet_m")
    glance_mod <- glance(model)
    tibble(
      slope = slope_row$estimate,
      SE = slope_row$std.error,
      p_value = slope_row$p.value,
      R2 = glance_mod$r.squared,
      N = nrow(df)
    )
  }) %>% ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    p_value_fmt = ifelse(p_value < 0.05, paste0("**", signif(p_value,3),"**"), signif(p_value,3))
  )
mass_results_clean <- mass_results %>%
  select(-p_value)  # drop the raw numeric column

# Pivot Unique / Universal to same row
mass_wide <- mass_results_clean %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Sharing_Type,
    values_from = c(slope, SE, p_value_fmt, R2, N),
    names_sep = "_"
  )

# Flextable with spanners
unique_cols <- grep("_Unique$", names(mass_wide))
univ_cols   <- grep("_Universal$", names(mass_wide))
first_cols <- 1:3  # Aquatic_Type, Landcover, Class


#-----------------------------
# 1. Round numeric columns to 3 significant figures
#-----------------------------
mass_wide <- mass_wide %>%
  mutate(across(
    where(is.numeric),
    ~ signif(., 3)
  ))

#-----------------------------
# 2. Reorder columns: put Universal first, then Unique
#-----------------------------
# Identify Universal and Unique columns
univ_cols <- grep("_Universal$", names(mass_wide), value = TRUE)
unique_cols <- grep("_Unique$", names(mass_wide), value = TRUE)

# Keep first three columns first
first_cols <- c("Aquatic_Type", "Landcover", "Class")

# Reorder
mass_wide <- mass_wide %>%
  select(all_of(first_cols), all_of(univ_cols), all_of(unique_cols))

#-----------------------------
# 3. Clean up column labels for flextable
#-----------------------------
# Map old column names to simple names
col_labels <- c(
  Aquatic_Type = "Aquatic Type",
  Landcover = "Landcover",
  Class = "Compound Class"
)

# Universal columns
for(col in univ_cols) {
  if(grepl("slope", col)) col_labels[col] <- "Slope"
  if(grepl("SE", col)) col_labels[col] <- "SE"
  if(grepl("p_value_fmt", col)) col_labels[col] <- "P"
  if(grepl("R2", col)) col_labels[col] <- "R²"
  if(grepl("^N_", col)) col_labels[col] <- "N"
}

# Unique columns
for(col in unique_cols) {
  if(grepl("slope", col)) col_labels[col] <- "Slope"
  if(grepl("SE", col)) col_labels[col] <- "SE"
  if(grepl("p_value_fmt", col)) col_labels[col] <- "p-value"
  if(grepl("R2", col)) col_labels[col] <- "R²"
  if(grepl("^N_", col)) col_labels[col] <- "N"
}

#-----------------------------
# 4. Flextable with spanners
#-----------------------------
ft_mass <- flextable(mass_wide) %>%
  set_header_labels(values = col_labels) %>%
  add_header_row(
    values = c("", "", "", "Universal", "Unique"),
    colwidths = c(
      rep(1, length(first_cols)),
      length(univ_cols),
      length(unique_cols)
    )
  ) %>%
  align(align = "center", part = "all") %>%
  autofit()

ft_mass
#write.csv(mass_wide, "ft_mass.csv", row.names = FALSE)
#-----------------------------
# NOSC table (bulk NOSC)
#-----------------------------
#-----------------------------
# 1. Run regressions by Aquatic_Type × Landcover × Sharing_Type
#-----------------------------
df_nosc <- ft_site_all %>%
  filter(Aquatic_Type != "Porewater") %>%
  left_join(
    compound_flags_pw %>% select(MolecularFormula, unique, universal) %>% distinct(),
    by = "MolecularFormula"
  ) %>%
  mutate(Sharing_Type = case_when(
    unique ~ "Unique",
    universal ~ "Universal",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Sharing_Type))

nosc_results <- df_nosc %>%
  group_by(Aquatic_Type, Landcover, Sharing_Type) %>%
  group_modify(~{
    df <- .x
    if(nrow(df) < 3) return(tibble(
      slope = NA_real_, SE = NA_real_, p_value = NA_real_,
      R2 = NA_real_, N = nrow(df)
    ))
    model <- lm(NOSC ~ DistancetoOutlet_m, data = df)
    slope_row <- tidy(model) %>% filter(term == "DistancetoOutlet_m")
    glance_mod <- glance(model)
    tibble(
      slope = slope_row$estimate,
      SE = slope_row$std.error,
      p_value = slope_row$p.value,
      R2 = glance_mod$r.squared,
      N = nrow(df)
    )
  }) %>% ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    p_value_fmt = ifelse(p_value < 0.05, paste0("**", signif(p_value,3),"**"), signif(p_value,3))
  )

#-----------------------------
# 2. Collapse to one row per Aquatic_Type × Landcover
#-----------------------------
nosc_results_clean <- nosc_results %>%
  group_by(Aquatic_Type, Landcover) %>%
  summarise(
    slope_Universal = slope[Sharing_Type == "Universal"][1],
    SE_Universal = SE[Sharing_Type == "Universal"][1],
    P_Universal = p_value_fmt[Sharing_Type == "Universal"][1],
    R2_Universal = R2[Sharing_Type == "Universal"][1],
    N_Universal = N[Sharing_Type == "Universal"][1],
    
    slope_Unique = slope[Sharing_Type == "Unique"][1],
    SE_Unique = SE[Sharing_Type == "Unique"][1],
    P_Unique = p_value_fmt[Sharing_Type == "Unique"][1],
    R2_Unique = R2[Sharing_Type == "Unique"][1],
    N_Unique = N[Sharing_Type == "Unique"][1],
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  rename(Landcover = Subcategory)

#-----------------------------
# 3. Round to 3 significant figures
#-----------------------------
nosc_results_clean <- nosc_results_clean %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ signif(., 3)))

#-----------------------------
# 4. Flextable with spanners
#-----------------------------
ft_nosc <- flextable(nosc_results_clean) %>%
  set_header_labels(
    Aquatic_Type = "Aquatic Type",
    Landcover = "Landcover",
    # Universal
    slope_Universal = "Slope",
    SE_Universal = "SE",
    P_Universal = "p-value",
    R2_Universal = "R²",
    N_Universal = "N",
    # Unique
    slope_Unique = "Slope",
    SE_Unique = "SE",
    P_Unique = "p-value",
    R2_Unique = "R²",
    N_Unique = "N"
  ) %>%
  add_header_row(
    values = c("", "", "Universal", "Unique"),
    colwidths = c(1,1,5,5)
  ) %>%
  align(align = "center", part = "all") %>%
  autofit()

ft_nosc
# Ready tables
ft_mass  # Mass by compound class
ft_nosc  # Bulk NOSC

##export to the words
#-----------------------------
# 1. Create Word document
#-----------------------------
doc <- read_docx()

#-----------------------------
# 2. Add Mass table
#-----------------------------
doc <- doc %>%
  body_add_par("Mass Regression Results by Compound Class", style = "heading 2") %>%
  body_add_flextable(ft_mass) %>%
  body_add_par("", style = "Normal")  # spacer

#-----------------------------
# 3. Add NOSC table
#-----------------------------
doc <- doc %>%
  body_add_par("Bulk NOSC Regression Results", style = "heading 2") %>%
  body_add_flextable(ft_nosc)

#-----------------------------
# 4. Export Word file
#-----------------------------
#print(doc, target = "Regression_Results.docx")
```
